metadata.description: Data Science skill track from programming foundations through statistics, machine learning, big data engineering, visualization, and domain applications

nodes.label: Python Basics
nodes.description: Python fundamentals: variables, data types, control flow, functions, and object-oriented basics for data science.

nodes.label: R Basics
nodes.description: R fundamentals: vectors, data frames, tidyverse, ggplot2, and R's statistical computing environment.

nodes.label: SQL Fundamentals
nodes.description: SQL queries: SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY, subqueries, window functions, and database interaction for data retrieval.

nodes.label: Data Types & Structures
nodes.description: Structured vs unstructured data, tabular data, JSON, CSV, time series, text, and image data formats.

nodes.label: Data Ethics
nodes.description: Privacy, consent, bias in data collection, GDPR, anonymization, and responsible data handling practices.

nodes.label: NumPy & Pandas
nodes.description: NumPy arrays, Pandas DataFrames, indexing, groupby, and core data manipulation libraries in Python.

nodes.label: Jupyter & Notebooks
nodes.description: Jupyter notebooks, markdown cells, magic commands, reproducible analysis, and notebook best practices.

nodes.label: Command Line Basics
nodes.description: Terminal navigation, file manipulation, shell scripting, environment variables, and CLI tools for data science.

nodes.label: Version Control & Git
nodes.description: Git fundamentals, branching, pull requests, and collaborative workflows for data science projects.

nodes.label: File Formats & I/O
nodes.description: Reading and writing CSV, JSON, Parquet, Excel, and HDF5 files. Efficient I/O for large datasets.

nodes.label: Data Cleaning
nodes.description: Handling duplicates, outliers, inconsistent formats, type coercion, and data quality assessment techniques.

nodes.label: Missing Data Handling
nodes.description: Types of missingness (MCAR, MAR, MNAR), imputation strategies, deletion methods, and impact on analysis.

nodes.label: Merging & Joining Data
nodes.description: Inner, outer, left, and right joins in Pandas and SQL. Concatenation, merge keys, and handling conflicts.

nodes.label: Reshaping & Pivoting
nodes.description: Wide vs long format, pivot tables, melt, stack/unstack, and tidy data principles.

nodes.label: Regular Expressions
nodes.description: Pattern matching, text extraction, substitution, and using regex in Python and R for data cleaning.

nodes.label: APIs & Web Scraping
nodes.description: REST APIs, JSON parsing, authentication, rate limiting, web scraping with BeautifulSoup, and ethical scraping.

nodes.label: String Manipulation
nodes.description: String methods, text cleaning, encoding issues, string formatting, and working with categorical text data.

nodes.label: Date & Time Handling
nodes.description: Parsing dates, time zones, date arithmetic, resampling temporal data, and time-based indexing.

nodes.label: Descriptive Statistics
nodes.description: Mean, median, mode, variance, standard deviation, percentiles, skewness, and kurtosis.

nodes.label: Probability Distributions
nodes.description: Normal, binomial, Poisson, exponential, and uniform distributions. QQ-plots and distribution fitting.

nodes.label: Correlation Analysis
nodes.description: Pearson, Spearman, and Kendall correlations. Correlation matrices, heatmaps, and correlation vs causation.

nodes.label: Matplotlib & Seaborn
nodes.description: Line plots, scatter plots, histograms, box plots, violin plots, pair plots, and statistical visualizations.

nodes.label: Interactive Visualization (Plotly)
nodes.description: Interactive charts with Plotly, hover tooltips, animations, and Plotly Express for rapid exploration.

nodes.label: GroupBy & Aggregation
nodes.description: Split-apply-combine pattern, aggregation functions, pivot tables, and multi-level groupby operations.

nodes.label: Outlier Detection
nodes.description: IQR method, Z-scores, isolation forests, and strategies for handling outliers in analysis.

nodes.label: Hypothesis Testing
nodes.description: Null and alternative hypotheses, p-values, significance levels, Type I/II errors, t-tests, and chi-squared tests.

nodes.label: Confidence Intervals
nodes.description: Constructing and interpreting confidence intervals, margin of error, sample size determination, and bootstrapping.

nodes.label: A/B Testing
nodes.description: Experiment design, control and treatment groups, statistical power, sample size calculation, and interpreting results.

nodes.label: Bayesian Basics
nodes.description: Bayes' theorem, prior and posterior distributions, Bayesian updating, and comparison with frequentist approaches.

nodes.label: Regression Analysis
nodes.description: Linear and multiple regression, assumptions, diagnostics, residual analysis, R-squared, and adjusted R-squared.

nodes.label: ANOVA
nodes.description: One-way and two-way ANOVA, F-test, post-hoc tests (Tukey, Bonferroni), and assumptions checking.

nodes.label: Time Series Analysis
nodes.description: Trend, seasonality, stationarity, ACF/PACF, ARIMA, exponential smoothing, and forecasting techniques.

nodes.label: Sampling Methods
nodes.description: Random sampling, stratified sampling, bootstrapping, resampling techniques, and survey design principles.

nodes.label: Non-Parametric Methods
nodes.description: Mann-Whitney U, Kruskal-Wallis, Wilcoxon signed-rank, and when to use non-parametric alternatives.

nodes.label: Classification
nodes.description: Logistic regression, decision trees, random forests, gradient boosting, and classification metrics (precision, recall, F1).

nodes.label: Clustering
nodes.description: K-means, hierarchical clustering, DBSCAN, silhouette analysis, and choosing the number of clusters.

nodes.label: Recommendation Systems
nodes.description: Collaborative filtering, content-based filtering, matrix factorization, and hybrid recommendation approaches.

nodes.label: Text Mining
nodes.description: Bag-of-words, TF-IDF, topic modeling (LDA), sentiment analysis, and NLP pipelines for data science.

nodes.label: Feature Engineering
nodes.description: Feature scaling, encoding, selection, extraction, polynomial features, and creating domain-specific features.

nodes.label: Model Selection & Evaluation
nodes.description: Cross-validation, bias-variance tradeoff, ROC curves, learning curves, and model comparison strategies.

nodes.label: Ensemble Methods
nodes.description: Bagging, boosting (XGBoost, LightGBM), stacking, voting classifiers, and ensemble model strategies.

nodes.label: Anomaly Detection
nodes.description: Statistical methods, isolation forests, autoencoders for anomaly detection, and fraud detection use cases.

nodes.label: Dimensionality Reduction
nodes.description: PCA, t-SNE, UMAP, feature selection methods, and visualizing high-dimensional data.

nodes.label: Apache Spark
nodes.description: Spark architecture, RDDs, DataFrames, Spark SQL, PySpark, and distributed data processing.

nodes.label: Hadoop Ecosystem
nodes.description: HDFS, MapReduce concepts, Hive, and the Hadoop ecosystem for large-scale data storage and processing.

nodes.label: Data Warehousing
nodes.description: Star and snowflake schemas, OLAP vs OLTP, data marts, Redshift, BigQuery, and Snowflake platforms.

nodes.label: ETL Pipelines
nodes.description: Extract-Transform-Load workflows, Airflow, dbt, data quality checks, and pipeline orchestration.

nodes.label: Stream Processing
nodes.description: Real-time data processing with Kafka, Spark Streaming, event-driven architectures, and windowing strategies.

nodes.label: NoSQL Databases
nodes.description: MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis, document vs key-value vs columnar stores, and when to use NoSQL.

nodes.label: Cloud Data Platforms
nodes.description: AWS, GCP, and Azure data services. S3, GCS, cloud-based ML, and infrastructure for data science.

nodes.label: Dashboard Design
nodes.description: Dashboard layout principles, KPI selection, user-centered design, interactivity, and refresh strategies.

nodes.label: Tableau & Power BI
nodes.description: Building dashboards in Tableau and Power BI, calculated fields, data connections, and publishing.

nodes.label: D3.js
nodes.description: Data-driven documents, SVG manipulation, scales, axes, transitions, and custom interactive web visualizations.

nodes.label: Narrative with Data
nodes.description: Data storytelling, structuring presentations, choosing the right chart, annotation, and persuading with data.

nodes.label: Advanced Chart Types
nodes.description: Treemaps, Sankey diagrams, radar charts, waterfall charts, and choosing visualizations for different data stories.

nodes.label: Geospatial Visualization
nodes.description: Mapping with Folium, GeoPandas, choropleth maps, and spatial data visualization techniques.

nodes.label: Financial Analytics
nodes.description: Portfolio analysis, risk modeling, fraud detection, credit scoring, and financial time series forecasting.

nodes.label: Business Analytics
nodes.description: Customer segmentation, churn prediction, revenue forecasting, cohort analysis, and KPI dashboards.

nodes.label: Healthcare Analytics
nodes.description: Clinical data analysis, survival analysis, epidemiological modeling, EHR data, and health outcome prediction.

nodes.label: Marketing Analytics
nodes.description: Attribution modeling, CLV estimation, campaign analysis, funnel optimization, and marketing mix modeling.

nodes.label: Sports Analytics
nodes.description: Player performance metrics, win probability models, draft analysis, and sports data visualization.
